description: HTTP/WS binding conformance for message ingest, polling, head retrieval, overload signaling, ACK, cursor-expiry handling, WS framing/pull chunking, SSE pull framing/backpressure, idempotency/replay evidence, and multi-session replay/reconnect hardening.

checks.description: message_type values must be registered in registry/message_types.json
when CP-ORDERING-0.1 is ordered, embedded_messages must provide contiguous prev_msg_hash -> message_hash linkage
when CP-RELIABILITY-0.1 is at_most_once, embedded_messages must not contain duplicate message_id values
when CP-RELIABILITY-0.1 is at_least_once, duplicate message_id values must keep identical message_hash values
wsPullMessages must use pull frame semantics, obey chunk more flags, and respect pull limit
WS messages frames must mirror embedded_messages by (message_id, message_hash) pairs
ssePullMessages must enforce pull chunk semantics (messages unless overload-only, final more=false, delivered<=limit)
SSE messages event pairs (message_id,message_hash) must be mirrored in embedded_messages
sendMessage must include Idempotency-Key derived from embedded message_id
replay_of cases must reference earlier case evidence, stay within the same session scope, and mark replay response headers/status
overload 429 responses must include Retry-After and at least one RateLimit-* hint header
if auth evidence exists, request must include Authorization: Bearer <token>
createSession evidence must define known session_id values; every session-scoped path/body/top-level session reference must be coherent and map to a created session
reconnect_of SSE pulls must carry Last-Event-ID and query.after matching referenced cursor
